steps.text:
```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Scrape news.ycombinator.com] --> B[Extract top 5 titles and points]
    B --> C[Format as markdown table]
```

I am accessing news.ycombinator.com to retrieve the top 5 stories.

formats.prompt: List the top 5 stories on Hacker News. For each story, provide the title and the number of points. Provide the URL for each story as well.

output.answer:
1. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan, 1147 points, https://www.stepsecurity.io/blog/axios-compromised-on-npm-malicious-versions-drop-remote-access-trojan
2. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview, 395 points, https://ollama.com/blog/mlx
3. Artemis II is not safe to fly, 484 points, https://idlewords.com/2026/03/artemis_ii_is_not_safe_to_fly.htm
4. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry, 570 points, https://twitter.com/Fried_rice/status/2038894956459290963
5. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments, 50 points, https://www.psypost.org/audio-tapes-reveal-mass-rule-breaking-in-milgram-s-obedience-experiments-2026-03-26/
